title: Relkass

{{Quote|Seemed a hard way to make a few credits. Still, it was enough to get me off planet, but I, for one, never want to see another drag the rest of my life.|Entry from the personal diary of Commander Lajar Weqill|<ref name="Moonlight" />}}
'''Relkass''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that featured an equatorial region of [[Grass/Legends|grasslands]]. The grasslands were home to the [[Cactus/Legends|cactus]] known as the [[Relkass sentinel plant]], which contained a powerful [[Spice|narcotic]] compound in its juice.

During Relkass' dry season, the sentinel [[Plant/Legends|plants]] were [[Diet/Legends|fed upon]] by the [[draagax]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Standard day/Legends|nocturnal]] pack creatures. The narcotic compound induced a state of frenzy in the draagax, causing them to attack other creatures on sight. The resulting losses suffered by the local [[Farmer/Legends|ranchers]] led to a regular posting of [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] on draagax pelts. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Lajar Weqill]] once joined a [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] party on Relkass that fell prey to a draagax attack, an experience that proved deeply disturbing to Weqill.

==Description==
{{Quote|We weren't more than 500 meters from the Jameson ranch before we heard the first high-pitched cries of a pack of drags on the hunt. ''[…]'' The first cries had barely died away before the first sound of padded paws on dried grass signalled our first…and last…warning of the attack.|Entry from the personal diary of Commander Lajar Weqill|<ref name="Moonlight" />}}
[[File:Saijo_sector.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Relkass was located in the Outer Rim Territories' Saijo sector.]]
Relkass was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Creatures" /> that had at least one [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="Moonlight" /> It was located in the [[Relkass system/Legends|Relkass system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Saijo sector/Legends|Saijo sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

A world with a pronounced dry season each [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Relkass featured equatorial [[Grass/Legends|grasslands]] that were home to small rodents. The grasslands' [[Plant/Legends|flora]] included the [[Relkass sentinel plant]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Cactus/Legends|cactus]] [[Flower/Legends|blooming]] in the planet's dry season; and [[Razor grass|razorgrass]],<ref name="Creatures" /> which could also be found on<ref name="Cracken">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] world<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]]<ref name="Cracken" /> and the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>

Relkass' grasslands were neighbored by foothills dotted with numerous [[Cave/Legends|caves]], in which lived a species of [[Standard day/Legends|nocturnal]], [[Diet/Legends|omnivorous]] pack creatures known as [[draagax]]. The draagax normally fed on the grasslands' plants and rodents. However, when they ingested the juice of the Relkass sentinel plant—which contained a powerful [[Spice|narcotic]] compound—the draagax entered a state of berserker-like frenzy that drove them to attack [[Endothermy|warm-blooded]] creatures, including [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]], on sight.<ref name="Creatures" />

==History==
{{Quote|Thinking about it afterwards, I can't say for sure just who was acting more insane that night—all those crazy drags spiced up on plant juice or the idiot Humans standing back to back, firing madly into the darkness over and over again.|Entry from the personal diary of Commander Lajar Weqill|<ref name="Moonlight" />}}
[[File:Draagax.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The draagax, a species native to Relkass]]
At some point, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Lajar Weqill]] visited Relkass and ended up without enough [[Currency/Legends|currency]] to leave the planet. The local [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Jameson]] convinced Weqill to join his party, which included [[Grendles]] and [[Zonder (Relkass)|Zonder]], for a hunt on draagax.<ref name="Moonlight" />

The group set out from the [[Jameson ranch]] after darkness had fallen and was attacked by a pack of draagax not more than 500 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] from the ranch. The creatures surrounded the hunting party, and the latter launched into a frenzied shooting spree to ward them off, a situation that continued until the breaking of dawn. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the [[Death/Legends|slain]] draagax was enough for Weqill to travel off Relkass; however, the commander was left deeply disturbed by the experience of the hunt and recorded it in an entry of a personal diary.<ref name="Moonlight" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|Maybe Jameson was right. After all he'd lived here all his life. If he said we could handle things, he ought to know.|Entry from the personal diary of Commander Lajar Weqill|<ref name="Moonlight" />}}
The inhabitants of Relkass included [[Farmer/Legends|ranchers]], who suffered losses due to draagax attacks. The situation led the local officials to offer a bounty<ref name="Creatures" /> of 200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per draagax pelt<ref name="Moonlight" /> every dry season.<ref name="Creatures" /> The Jameson ranch was located on Relkass, and the hunter Jameson was a [[Homeworld/Legends|native resident]] of the planet.<ref name="Moonlight" />

==Behind the scenes==
Relkass was first mentioned in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Creatures" /> The book also featured an [[in-universe]] appearance of the planet within the short companion narrative "[[A Moonlight Stroll In The Country...]]"<ref name="Moonlight" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Relkass [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Relkass, in grid square K-20.<ref name="TEA" />
